svg.title: JavaScript Promise Structure
svg.desc: new Promise ke andar resolve aur reject ka visual flow

g.onclick: sendPrompt('new Promise() kaise kaam karta hai JavaScript mein?')
sendPrompt('resolve() kya karta hai Promise mein?')
sendPrompt('reject() kya karta hai Promise mein?')
sendPrompt('Promise fulfilled state kya hoti hai?')
sendPrompt('Promise rejected state kya hoti hai?')
sendPrompt('.then() kaise use karte hain Promise ke saath?')
sendPrompt('.catch() kaise use karte hain Promise ke saath?')
sendPrompt('Promise pending state kya hoti hai?')
